- Update ck3 melter to 1.18.3
- Update eu5 melter to 1.1
- Fix ck2 and vic2 detection on Linux not working
- Fix ck3 mod detection for render CLI command not accepting mod names, only IDs
- Fix ck2 modded savegames in different save dir not being detected
- Fix converter integration failing if a game mod directory did not exist yet
- Improve default text editor detection on Windows
- Show flag preview for EU5 metadata flag data in editor
- Improve Proton game detection for Linux
- Add setting to disable keyboard shortcuts
- Improve render performance on Windows
- Improve parser resilience against semi-corrupted saves
